flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Harford Community College rose 15% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $9.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Harford Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
